title: 7 Pcs Jungle Safari Animal Balloons Set,Lion 18in Large Foil Balloons,Animal Theme Party Decoration,Wild Animal Theme Birthday Party Decorations for Kids,Boys & Girls,Baby Shower & Zoo Party Supplies
features: 【Complete Jungle Animal Balloons Set】This 7-piece jungle safari animal balloon kit is the ultimate decoration for a wild celebration! Featuring a lion, each large 18-inch foil balloon is designed to create a spectacular and immersive jungle-themed party atmosphere for birthdays and baby showers.

【Premium Quality & Reusable Materials】Crafted from durable, eco-friendly aluminium foil with vibrant double-sided prints, ourjungle birthday decorations for 1 year old are built to last. Ensuring your safari party decorations stay vibrant and beautiful throughout the event and can be reused.

【Effortless to Inflate】Enjoy a hassle-free setup! Our jungle safari animal party decorations feature a convenient self-sealing design – simply inflate and pinch the valve to seal securely without tying knots. They can be easily deflated without damage, making storage and reuse a breeze.

【Delightful Child-Friendly Designs】The zoo baby shower balloons showcases a charming, friendly-faced jungle animal. These decorations are visually striking and greatly capture the fun and wonder of a safari adventure, creating a truly memorable backdrop for your little explorer's party.

【Great for Jungle & Safari Theme Parties】Transform any space into a jungle oasis! This set is a great choice for a 1st, 2nd or 3rd birthday, whether for a boy or a girl. It's also ideal for zoo-themed baby showers, making it a wonderfully versatile party decoration supply.
description: Product description 7 Pcs Jungle Safari Animal Balloons Set,Lion 18in Large Foil Balloons,Animal Theme Party Decoration,Wild Animal Theme Birthday Party Decorations for Kids,Boys & Girls,Baby Shower & Zoo Party Supplies Package Include: 2 x 18-inch round Happy Birthday animals balloon 1 x lion balloon 1 x straw 2 x 18-inch gold five-pointed stars balloon 1 x 10-meter silver ribbon Specification of Jungle Animals Theme Birthday Party Supplies: Material: Aluminum film material Style: Lion Size: Lion balloon: 70*101cm, other balloons: 18 inches Features of Wild Animal Themed Birthday Decorations: --Bring the magic of the wild to your celebration! These eye-catching animal foil balloons instantly elevate your party decor, making them perfect for photo backdrops, room dressing and creating a joyful, festive vibe that will delight all your little guests. --From a child's first birthday to a wild jungle house party, this decoration set adds a touch of adventure. It is expertly designed to be the centrepiece of your safari party decor, ensuring a cohesive and exciting theme that impresses everyone. --This complete jungle safari decor kit providing all the essential decorative elements to create a coordinated and themed party. Notes: --Manually measuring the size error is a normal phenomenon, please refer to the actual product. --Due to different shooting environments and angles, slight chromatic aberrations are normal. Safety Warning NO
